query:
SELECT externalId, name, billingPlatform 
FROM customers 
WHERE name LIKE '%nfinitea%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Joshelley%' 
   OR name LIKE '%Bel%Resto%'
   OR name LIKE '%Little Cha%'
   OR name LIKE '%Nicki%'
   OR name LIKE '%Poppy%'
   OR name LIKE '%Serenity%'
   OR name LIKE '%Allegra%'
   OR name LIKE '%Varsity Apart%'
   OR name LIKE '%Community Lifestyle%'
   OR name LIKE '%Noosa Golf%'
   OR name LIKE '%Tewantin%'
ORDER BY name;
